page.title: Shipping rules
page.subtitle: Tell us how you build outgoing parcels (outer box, void filler, tape) based on how many items an order has. We'll use these rules to calculate the EPR weight of every shipment.

no_inventory_banner.title: Set up your packaging inventory first
no_inventory_banner.body: Before creating shipping rules you need at least one outer box, one tape and one filler in your inventory.

empty_state.heading: No shipping rules yet
empty_state.body: Create your first rule to define how outgoing parcels are built based on item count.

rule_card.range_with_max: Applies to orders with {{min}} to {{max}} items.
rule_card.range_without_max: Applies to orders with at least {{min}} items.
rule_card.no_components: No packaging configured in this rule.

form.name_help: Give the rule a name you'll recognize later.
form.max_items_help: Set the same value as min to apply the rule to an exact item count.
form.range_help: Rules trigger based on the order's item count.
form.group_help_with_groups: Leave "None" to apply the rule to every product (catch-all).
form.group_help_empty: You haven't created any product groups. Create one from the Groups page to scope rules.
form.secondary_help: The packaging that wraps the parcel before shipping.
form.filler_help: Material that fills empty space in the box (bubble wrap, paper, chips…).
form.tape_help: The tape you use to seal the box.
form.priority_help: When two rules overlap for the same order, the higher priority wins.

delete_modal.title: Delete rule?
delete_modal.body: Do you really want to delete the rule {{name}}?

toasts.name_required: Give the rule a name before saving.
toasts.suspended: Rule paused: it won't apply to new orders.
